name: Chicken Fajitas#2
recipeIngredient: 2 Boneless whole chicken breasts, split in half and skin removed (8 to 10 oz each)
1 medium green pepper, sliced into thin rings
1 medium onion, thinly sliced into rings
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large food-storage bag, combine chicken and 3/4 cup taquila marinade.
2. Chill remaining marinade in the refrigerator.
3. Secure bag and chill at least 2 hours, turning the bag over once or twice.
4. Prepare grill for low direct heat.
5. In an 8-inch square baking dish, arrange chicken breasts with meaty portions toward the outside edges. Pour marinade over chicken. Cover with wax paper.
6. Microwave on High for 4 to 6 minutes, until exterior of meat is no longer pink and juices run clear. Rearrange chicken breasts once.
7. Place chicken on the cooking grid. Grill, uncovered, for 8 to 12 minutes, until chicken is no longer pink and juices run clear, turning once.
8. Wrap grilled chicken in foil and keep warm. Set aside.
9. In a 1-quart casserole, combine remaining 1/4 cup marinade, green pepper, and onion. Cover and microwave on High for 5 to 7 minutes until peppers and onions are tender-crisp, stirring once or twice.
10. Set aside. Place tortillas between two dampened paper towels. Microwave on High for 45 seconds to 1 minute until warm to the touch.
11. Cut each chicken breast into thin strips. Place strips in a warm tortilla.
12. Top with 1/4 of the pepper and onion mixture. Fold up from the bottom.
13. Fold in sides and secure with a wooden pick, leaving the top open.
14. Top with salsa, sour cream, and guacamole if desired.
